requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (France)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（法国）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（法國）

summary.en: France applies Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU in full as an EU member state. Heat pump refrigerant circuits are classified as pressure equipment under PED. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require a Notified Body. EN 378 applies for system-level refrigerating system safety. In France, Article R557-7-1 of the Code de l'environnement also transposes PED obligations into national law.
summary.zh: 法国作为欧盟成员国，完整适用压力设备指令2014/68/EU。热泵制冷剂回路依据PED被列为压力设备。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378适用于系统级制冷系统安全。在法国，《环境法典》第R557-7-1条也将PED义务转化为国家法律。
summary.zht: 法國作為歐盟成員國，完整適用壓力設備指令2014/68/EU。熱泵制冷劑迴路依據PED被列為壓力設備。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378適用於系統級制冷系統安全。在法國，《環境法典》第R557-7-1條也將PED義務轉化為國家法律。

standards_or_laws: Article R557-7-1 Code de l'environnement (French PED transposition)

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not recognised as equivalent to CE PED marking.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册与CE PED标志不等效。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記與CE PED標誌不等效。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED for French market access. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, an EU Notified Body must be engaged. French Code de l'environnement Article R557-7-1 mirrors this obligation nationally. NF DTU standards for refrigerant piping installation may also apply once the unit is installed in France.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）不被认可用于法国市场准入。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入欧盟公告机构。法国《环境法典》第R557-7-1条在国家层面对应该义务。安装于法国境内时，NF DTU制冷剂管道安装标准也可能适用。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）不被認可用於法國市場准入。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入歐盟公告機構。法國《環境法典》第R557-7-1條在國家層面對應該義務。安裝於法國境內時，NF DTU制冷劑管道安裝標準也可能適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies; French Code de l'environnement Art. R557-7-1 national transposition)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised in France; French Code de l'environnement Art. R557-7-1 reinforces PED obligations nationally.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在法国不被认可；法国《环境法典》第R557-7-1条在国家层面强化PED义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在法國不被認可；法國《環境法典》第R557-7-1條在國家層面強化PED義務。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 and NF DTU Standards for France
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378及NF DTU标准（法国）
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378及NF DTU標準（法國）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds in France. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020 to EN 378-4 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems; applying them supports a presumption of conformity with relevant PED essential requirements. In France, NF DTU 65.11 and related NF DTU documents set installation standards for refrigerant piping and heat pump systems, and compliance with these NF DTU standards is typically required for insurance and subsidy eligibility. Installers must hold an RGE (Reconnu Garant de l'Environnement) qualification to be eligible for ADEME MaPrimeRénov' subsidies.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU是法国境内达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020至EN 378-4是制冷系统的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关PED基本要求的符合性推定。在法国，NF DTU 65.11及相关NF DTU文件为制冷剂管道和热泵系统安装设定标准，保险和补贴资格通常要求符合这些NF DTU标准。安装方须持有RGE（环境保证认可）资质方可获得ADEME马普里莫诺夫补贴。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是法國境內達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020至EN 378-4是制冷系統的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關PED基本要求的符合性推定。在法國，NF DTU 65.11及相關NF DTU文件為制冷劑管道和熱泵系統安裝設定標準，保險和補貼資格通常要求符合這些NF DTU標準。安裝方須持有RGE（環境保證認可）資質方可獲得ADEME馬普里莫諾夫補貼。

standards_or_laws: NF DTU 65.11 (French installation standard for heat pumps)

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. China has no equivalent to NF DTU installation standards or the French RGE installer qualification scheme.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237的当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。中国没有等效的NF DTU安装标准或法国RGE安装方资质认定体系。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237的當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。中國沒有等效的NF DTU安裝標準或法國RGE安裝方資質認定體系。

gap.en: EU PED applicability must be classified first for any French market placement. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Additionally, France requires compliance with NF DTU installation standards for system installation — a requirement with no Chinese equivalent. Installers must hold RGE qualification for subsidy eligibility, and this qualification has no equivalent in the Chinese supply chain.
gap.zh: 投放法国市场前须先判定欧盟PED适用性。EN 378关于文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制的方法与GB 9237不同。此外，法国要求系统安装符合NF DTU安装标准——这一要求在中国没有对应规范。安装方须持有RGE资质方可获得补贴，且该资质在中国供应链中无对应机制。
gap.zht: 投放法國市場前須先判定歐盟PED適用性。EN 378關於文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制的方法與GB 9237不同。此外，法國要求系統安裝符合NF DTU安裝標準——這一要求在中國沒有對應規範。安裝方須持有RGE資質方可獲得補貼，且該資質在中國供應鏈中無對應機制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED where thresholds met; NF DTU compliance required for insurance and subsidy eligibility in France; RGE qualification required for MaPrimeRénov' installation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; EN 378 methods differ from GB 9237; French NF DTU installation standards and RGE installer qualification add France-specific obligations with no Chinese equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；EN 378方法与GB 9237不同；法国NF DTU安装标准和RGE安装方资质为无中国对应规范的法国特有义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；EN 378方法與GB 9237不同；法國NF DTU安裝標準和RGE安裝方資質為無中國對應規範的法國特有義務。
